title: rubus aggregatus
intro: Rubus aggregatus, also known as the aggregate blackberry, is a type of wild blackberry plant native to parts of the world. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an astringent and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Rubus aggregatus include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Rubus aggregatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
